data.title: US promises to assist Argentina's economy and President Milei with all options available, Treasury Secretary confirms.
data.description: The Treasury Secretary, Scott Bessent, mentioned that various alternatives are being considered to assist President Javier Milei.

data.title: NxGen Brands, Inc. confirms purchase agreement for operating company.
data.description: Yesterday, it was reported that the stock market experienced a significant dip with the S&P 500 falling by 3.5% and the Dow Jones dropping by 4.6%. This marked the biggest one-day decline for both indices in over a year. The tech-heavy Nasdaq also saw a notable decrease of 2.7%. The sudden downturn was attributed to concerns over rising inflation rates and potential interest rate hikes by the Federal Reserve. Investors are closely monitoring the situation as the market continues to show volatility.

data.title: Dow Jones up, Nvidia jumps on OpenAI investment, Apple and Tesla pop, EV Play falls due to Warren Buffett move.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase on the stock market due to increased discussions from the Federal Reserve. Notably, Apple and Tesla also experienced significant increases. Nvidia saw a substantial jump following a major investment by OpenAI. The overall market trend was positive, with the Dow showing a rise. Notably, Nvidia's stock value surged, while there was a decrease in EV stocks due to actions by Warren Buffett. This update was provided by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Stock futures surged after mixed market close post Fed rate cut. Nvidia to purchase stake in Intel. Dow Jones signaling new highs.
data.description: After a mixed close on Tuesday following the Fed rate cut, futures surged. Nvidia announced plans to acquire a stake in Intel. Dow Jones futures indicate potential new highs in response to the Fed for the second consecutive day.

data.title: dunnhumby launches Incubate program in Bentonville, Ark to co-develop tech solutions with startups. #innovation #AI
data.description: In Bentonville, Arkansas, a global leader in Customer Data Science, dunnhumby, has unveiled dunnhumby Incubate, a novel program aiming to unearth and collaborate on cutting-edge technologies with forward-thinking specialists, business owners, and startup creators right from the beginning. Managed by dunnhumby ventures, the organization's platform for open innovation and venture investments, dunnhumby Incubate presents a distinctive chance for budding companies operating in data science and AI to flourish.

data.title: Transocean Ltd. to offer 100,000,000 shares at $0.10 par value with an option for 15,000,000 more in public offering.
data.description: Swiss-based Transocean Ltd. (NYSE: RIG) disclosed plans on Sept. 24, 2025, for an underwritten public offering featuring 100,000,000 shares of Transocean with a par value of $0.10 per share. The company will offer all shares in the offering. Additionally, Transocean may provide underwriters with a 30-day option to buy up to an extra 15,000,000 shares at the public offering price, after factoring in underwriting discounts and commissions.

data.title: U.S. mortgage market booms with a 29.7% increase in applications, as rates drop to 6.39%. Refinancing frenzy seen.
data.description: The U.S. mortgage market is witnessing a notable resurgence fueled by a sharp decline in borrowing costs, driving a significant wave of refinancing activity prior to the anticipated interest rate cut by the Federal Reserve. In the week ending Sept. 12, total mortgage applications surged by 29.7%, marking the largest weekly increase since January. The benchmark 30-year fixed mortgage rate dropped by 10 basis points to 6.39%, reaching its lowest level in almost a year. Refinancing activity led the charge, with the Mortgage Refinance Index spiking by 57.7% to 1,596.7, the highest since March 2022. The surge reflects borrowers' proactive response to lower rates, with homeowners swiftly locking in savings, as mentioned by MBA chief economist Mike Fratantoni. This trend also underlines the growing confidence in the housing market despite looming economic uncertainties.

data.title: Inspira to introduce HYLA™ Real-Time Blood Sensor at U.S. ELSO with 97.35% accuracy. Presentation at conference in DC on Sept 27–30.
data.description: Israeli company, Inspira™ Technologies OXY B.H.N. Ltd. (NASDAQ: IINN), known for pioneering life-support and diagnostic technologies, has revealed plans to introduce its groundbreaking HYLA blood sensor to the global medical community. The debut of HYLA will occur at the U.S. ELSO Annual Conference in Washington, D.C. from September 27 to 30, 2025. This will mark the first time the innovative technology will be showcased to medical professionals worldwide.

data.title: MiraDx's PROSTOX™ ultra study by UCLA at ASTRO 2025 shows high-risk prostate cancer patients can safely receive other radiation regimens.
data.description: In Los Angeles, a molecular diagnostics company called MiraDx revealed information about a study conducted at UCLA, which will be showcased at the 2025 American Society for Radiation Oncology (ASTRO) Annual Meeting in San Francisco from September 27 to October 1, 2025. The study, a collaboration between UCLA and other academic institutions, utilized MiraDx’s PROSTOX ultra test. This test was employed to distinguish prostate cancer patients who are at an increased risk of experiencing late-stage manifestations.

data.title: EverGen reports strong production numbers in July and August 2025: 16,000 GJs in July and 17,000 GJs in August.
data.description: EverGen Infrastructure Corp. provided an operational update on its renewable natural gas (RNG) and organic waste processing facilities. In July 2025, the Fraser Valley Biogas (FVB) and GrowTEC facilities generated about 16,000 gigajoules (GJs) of RNG, averaging around 520 GJ per day. The production increased in August to over 17,000 GJs, averaging about 550 GJ per day. These results signify ongoing progress and momentum at EverGen.

data.title: Mustang Energy Corp. readies for drilling on Surprise Creek Project in Saskatchewan on Sept 28, 2025.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on September 26, 2025, Mustang Energy Corp. is gearing up for drilling operations at the Surprise Creek Uranium-Copper Project. The company, identified as CSE: MEC, OTC:MECPF, FRA:92T, anticipates commencing the drill program on September 28, 2025.

data.title: Dickey's Barbecue in Calgary celebrates 1-year anniversary at 55 Castleridge Blvd NE #156, providing Legit. Texas. Barbecue.™.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, Dickey’s Barbecue Pit is marking the one-year milestone of its location at 55 Castleridge Blvd NE #156, offering 'Legit. Texas. Barbecue.™' to the region. Since its establishment in 2024, this Calgary restaurant has gained popularity among locals for its slow smoked meats, southern style sides, and warm hospitality. Jamal Kayani, the franchisee in Calgary, expressed great significance in commemorating the first year in the community.
